== Notes for [[Item:Q88800|Q88800]] ==

In Greek mythology,.......

Cleodaeus was one of the Heracleidae, a grandson of Heracles. He was the son of Heracles's eldest son [https://www.geni.com/people/Hyllus/6000000002187622536 Hyllus] and [https://www.geni.com/people/Iole/6000000002187622545 Iole of Oechalia]. He became father of Aristomachus, who led the third attempt to capture Mycenae and failed. He also had a daughter Lanassa, who married Neoptolemus and had by him several children, including Pyrrhus. Cleodaeus had a heroon at Sparta.

* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cleodaeus

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per03876.htm#0

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
